title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Install via pip install ollama; chat, embed, pull models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use local models in chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; Docker one-liner, multi-user, model manager.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; Maven Central artifact ollama4j.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; gem install ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI with fzf model picker, chat history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to your local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and NixOS module for Ollama; declarative model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) published to Docker Hub ollama/ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration; use Ollama generators & embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit; one-command demo.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that chats with local Ollama models; slash commands & thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama for private channels; mention bot to chat.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a context-aware tool for Claude Desktop.

title: ollama-distroless
summary: Community distroless & GPU-less minimal image for sidecar injection in locked-down clusters.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete & summarization via Ollama.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin to run Ollama models on blocks for summarization or Q&A.
